mainEntity.name: What if AEO content gets copied by competitors in Houston?
mainEntity.text: What if AEO content gets copied by competitors in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: Original AEO content with schema timestamps protects Houston firms; file DMCA if stolen, prioritize unique local insights.[1][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Competitors copying dilutes your edge—use canonical tags, watermark schema. Focus on proprietary NY/LA data. Legal recourse rare but viable; better: Outpace with fresh updates.[1]

name: Handling AEO Content Theft in Houston
description: Original AEO content with schema timestamps protects Houston firms; file DMCA if stolen, prioritize unique local insights.[1][4]
